Course.title: Course
Course.description: An anatomy course containing multiple lectures

description.description: Detailed description of the course content

duration.description: Total duration of the course lectures

lecturesCount.description: Number of lectures within the course

lectures.description: List of lectures belonging to this course

User.title: User
User.description: User account registration details and authorization role

uid.description: Unique user identification from Firebase Auth

email.description: Email address of the registered scholar

role.description: Access level role assigned to user

registrationPasscode.description: Optional validation passcode supplied during admin registration

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Student message inquiries and feedback submissions containing sensitive PII

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact query document

mobile.description: Contact phone number of the inquirer

message.description: Core message content of the inquiry

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp representing the submission time

read.description: Administrative status flag tracking whether a message was reviewed

AdminConfig.title: AdminConfig
AdminConfig.description: System configuration document tracking privileged admin emails

SettingsConfig.title: SettingsConfig
SettingsConfig.description: System configuration document tracking settings such as the admin registration passcode

FileBackup.title: FileBackup
FileBackup.description: Metadata for backed up file assets

courses/{courseId}.description: Anatomy course document mapping high-fidelity dissections

files/{filename}.description: Cloud backup of uploaded materials and anatomical files

files/{filename}/chunks/{chunkId}.description: Sub-1MB fragments of uploaded base64 data streams
